args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation flaw in the token refresh path affecting auth-api and session-store. Remediation tracked under TCK-9902.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117. auth-api will be patched to v5.8.4, followed by session-store to v2.2.9. Ticket: TCK-9902.

args.text: Both services confirmed patched: auth-api at v5.8.4 and session-store at v2.2.9. CVE-2026-30117 remediation deploys complete.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) are patched and verified. See patch-verification.md. Ticket TCK-9902 updated accordingly.

args.text: Credential rotation completed per rotation-checklist.md: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediation for CVE-2026-30117, credentials and sessions were rotated tonight. Please sign in again — you'll be prompted automatically. Contact IT if you have any issues.
